---
title: "SPARMVET Audit Report"
date: "{{date}}"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
params:
  manifest_id: "{{manifest_id}}"
  manifest_sha256: "{{manifest_sha256}}"
  t3_recipe_sha256: "{{t3_recipe_sha256}}"
  deployment_profile: "{{deployment_profile}}"
  export_timestamp: "{{export_timestamp}}"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import json, pathlib
report_data = json.loads(pathlib.Path("report_data.json").read_text())
```

## Study Context

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Manifest** | `{{manifest_id}}` |
| **Manifest SHA256** | `{{manifest_sha256}}` |
| **T3 Recipe SHA256** | `{{t3_recipe_sha256}}` |
| **Deployment Profile** | `{{deployment_profile}}` |
| **Exported** | `{{export_timestamp}}` |

## Data Summary

```{python}
#| echo: false
from IPython.display import Markdown
rows = []
for ds in report_data.get("datasets", []):
    rows.append(f"| `{ds['id']}` | `{ds['path']}` | {ds['n_rows']} rows |")
if rows:
    header = "| Dataset | Source | Rows |\n|---|---|---|\n"
    display(Markdown(header + "\n".join(rows)))
else:
    display(Markdown("*No dataset summary available.*"))
```

## Methods

The following adjustments were applied to the data in Tier 3 (Publication Finisher).
All modifications are recorded with their justification below.

```{python}
#| echo: false
methods = report_data.get("methods_text", [])
if methods:
    for line in methods:
        display(Markdown(f"- {line}"))
else:
    display(Markdown("*No Tier 3 adjustments were applied.*"))
```

## Figures

```{python}
#| echo: false
figures = report_data.get("figures", [])
for fig in figures:
    title = fig.get("title", fig.get("plot_id", ""))
    path = fig.get("path", "")
    if path and pathlib.Path(path).exists():
        display(Markdown(f"### {title}\n\n![]({path}){{width=90%}}"))
```

## Appendix: Decisions Considered and Discarded

The following nodes were created but deactivated before export.
They are included here for transparency only and do not affect the exported data.

```{python}
#| echo: false
discarded = report_data.get("discarded_nodes", [])
if discarded:
    for node in discarded:
        nt = node.get("node_type", "unknown")
        reason = node.get("reason", "—")
        params = node.get("params", {})
        display(Markdown(f"- **{nt}** — params: `{params}` — reason recorded: *{reason}*"))
else:
    display(Markdown("*No discarded nodes.*"))
```

## Raw T3 Recipe (Active Nodes)

```{python}
#| echo: false
import yaml
active_recipe = report_data.get("active_recipe", [])
if active_recipe:
    display(Markdown(f"```yaml\n{yaml.dump(active_recipe, allow_unicode=True, sort_keys=False)}\n```"))
else:
    display(Markdown("*No T3 recipe nodes.*"))
```
